label: Typewriter
summary: Courier text with letterspacing; the reveal modifier types it on.
era: The window.status typewriter loop that typed welcomes into the browser's status bar, promoted to the page, letter by letter.

classes.name: rs-typewriter--reveal
classes.role: modifier: types on with steps(); instant under reduced motion

a11y: The reveal is decoration over real text: under prefers-reduced-motion the line simply appears, fully typed. Screen readers always get the whole sentence.
